purpose: Reviewed accounting for Wave 12 maintenance scanner categories outside the src regression gate. Entries are fixed, accepted, or follow-up so repo-wide warnings are not rediscovered manually.

entries.rationale: Explanatory workaround wording was rewritten so the scanner no longer treats it as active TODO-like debt.
Explanatory store-nudge wording was rewritten so the scanner no longer treats it as active TODO-like debt.

BV calculation, crit-slot scanning, ammo resolution, weapon resolution, known-unit data, normalizers, and shared types were split into focused validator modules. The original critical monolith is gone; remaining high/warn file-bloat is tracked as follow-up validator architecture debt.

Metadata/type helpers and UnitVerifierOptions XML conversion were extracted to focused helper modules, dropping data_converter.py below the high Python file-bloat threshold while preserving converter imports.
The data converter remains just above the advisory Python size threshold after helper extraction; further parser-loop splits should wait for converter fixture parity coverage.
Serialized DTO dataclasses were extracted to mtf_serialized_models.py, dropping mtf_converter.py below the high Python file-bloat threshold while preserving converter behavior.
The MTF converter remains above the advisory Python size threshold after DTO extraction; finish the split only with converter fixture parity coverage.
Terminology tooling belongs to OpenSpec support and should be split only with strict terminology validation coverage.
Event-log formatting utility needs helper extraction with sample log fixtures.
BLK conversion scripts should be split together so shared parser helpers are extracted once.
BLK conversion scripts should be split together so shared parser helpers are extracted once.
Common BLK helpers should be split only when converter behavior fixtures are in place.

BLK conversion scripts should be split together so shared parser helpers are extracted once.
Enum mapping tables should be split only with converter fixture checks that prove mappings stay stable.
Simulation CLI should be split with journey/simulation smoke coverage in a focused script cleanup wave.
One-off BV analysis scripts share boilerplate and should be consolidated behind a small analysis harness.
Ammo/BV analysis scripts share boilerplate and should be consolidated behind a small analysis harness.
Secondary analysis boilerplate cluster belongs with the analysis script dedup wave.
Secondary analysis boilerplate cluster belongs with the analysis script dedup wave.
Secondary analysis boilerplate cluster belongs with the analysis script dedup wave.
Shared page-object utilities are now protected superclass helpers rather than public workflow methods.

entries.message: value object class has 9 public methods
entries.rationale: Desktop local storage service deliberately exposes a compact persistence facade; no runtime issue is indicated by this warning.

entries.message: value object class has 12 public methods
entries.rationale: RecentFilesService is a desktop service facade; current breadth is accepted until a desktop service cleanup wave changes it.

entries.message: value object class has 9 public methods
entries.rationale: SettingsService method breadth is accepted as desktop service API surface; the actionable dispatch issue is tracked separately.
The CLI/reporting orchestrator is now below critical size but still above the high rendering threshold; split report serialization and console rendering in the next validator architecture wave.
The unit BV calculator now owns the calculation core only; additional extraction should split defensive/offensive correction helpers with full BV parity coverage.
Critical-slot scanning is now isolated from the CLI and calculator, but it still needs a focused scanner-helper split guarded by BV parity and crit-slot fixture coverage.
Ammo resolution is separated from the validator core; the remaining size is mostly pattern tables and should move only with ammo fixture parity coverage.
